arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'seriously considering' move for 19-year-old defender wanted by Liverpool, Arsenal
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly 'seriously considering' a summer approach for a teenage defender also tipped to sign for Liverpool and Arsenal in the upcoming transfer window.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool now believe Chelsea are the most likely team to sign £50m player this summer
arts.sum: The summer transfer window is almost upon us, and, once again, the Premier League’s top dogs are going to do battle over some big-name players....
